name: credential-and-identity-abuse
description: Blocks common credential theft and identity abuse patterns including local secret file harvesting, token extraction, cloud credential abuse, and privileged auth pivots.

block.title: Block SSH private key access
block.name: block_ssh_private_key_access
block.description: Blocks attempts to access SSH private key material.

block.title: Block environment secret file access
block.name: block_env_file_access
block.description: Blocks direct access to environment files that commonly store secrets.

block.title: Block AWS credentials file access
block.name: block_aws_credentials_file_access
block.description: Blocks access to AWS credentials file.

block.title: Block Kubernetes config credential access
block.name: block_kubeconfig_access
block.description: Blocks access to Kubernetes client configuration and credentials.

block.title: Block GitHub CLI token extraction
block.name: block_github_cli_token_extraction
block.description: Blocks extraction of GitHub CLI auth tokens.

block.title: Block broad environment dump
block.name: block_broad_environment_dump
block.description: Blocks broad environment variable dumping, a common credential harvesting step.

block.title: Block SSH private key access via host monitor
block.name: block_ssh_private_key_access_shell_execute
block.description: Blocks attempts to access SSH private key material. (monitored shell path).

block.title: Block environment secret file access via host monitor
block.name: block_env_file_access_shell_execute
block.description: Blocks direct access to environment files that commonly store secrets. (monitored shell path).

block.title: Block AWS credentials file access via host monitor
block.name: block_aws_credentials_file_access_shell_execute
block.description: Blocks access to AWS credentials file. (monitored shell path).

block.title: Block Kubernetes config credential access via host monitor
block.name: block_kubeconfig_access_shell_execute
block.description: Blocks access to Kubernetes client configuration and credentials. (monitored shell path).

block.title: Block GitHub CLI token extraction via host monitor
block.name: block_github_cli_token_extraction_shell_execute
block.description: Blocks extraction of GitHub CLI auth tokens. (monitored shell path).

block.title: Block broad environment dump via host monitor
block.name: block_broad_environment_dump_shell_execute
block.description: Blocks broad environment variable dumping, a common credential harvesting step. (monitored shell path).

warn.title: Warn on credentialed HTTP exfiltration
warn.name: warn_credentialed_http_exfiltration
warn.description: Warns on outbound HTTP requests carrying likely credentials for review.

warn.title: Warn on secret config file access
warn.name: warn_secret_config_file_access
warn.description: Warns when npm credentials config is accessed.

warn.title: Warn on Python publishing credential access
warn.name: warn_python_publish_credentials_access
warn.description: Warns when Python package publishing credentials are accessed.

warn.title: Warn on cloud login token access
warn.name: warn_cloud_login_token_access
warn.description: Warns on cloud access token extraction commands.

warn.title: Warn on secret config file access via host monitor
warn.name: warn_secret_config_file_access_shell_execute
warn.description: Warns when npm credentials config is accessed. (monitored shell path).

warn.title: Warn on Python publishing credential access via host monitor
warn.name: warn_python_publish_credentials_access_shell_execute
warn.description: Warns when Python package publishing credentials are accessed. (monitored shell path).

warn.title: Warn on cloud login token access via host monitor
warn.name: warn_cloud_login_token_access_shell_execute
warn.description: Warns on cloud access token extraction commands. (monitored shell path).

monitor.title: Monitor credential-sensitive tool calls
monitor.name: monitor_credential_sensitive_tool_calls
monitor.description: Captures tool calls that may involve credential handling for investigation.
